[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010000000 2
1 1100000001 3
2 0001010000 2
3 1011001010 5
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0100010000 2
12 21 1100010000 3
23 32 1000010010 3
34 43 1001000010 3
45 54 1010000000 2 match 0
56 65 0000000000 a match 4 5 6 7
67 76 0001011000 3
70 07 0000010000 1

13 31 1000010000 2
24 42 1000100010 3
35 53 1000000000 1

57 75 1010000000 2 match 0
60 06 0000010000 1
71 17 1010010000 3

03 30 0000010000 1
14 41 1010000000 2 match 0
25 52 1100000001 3 match 1
36 63 0001010000 2 match 2
47 74 1011001010 5 match 3
50 05 0100000001 2
61 16 0000010000 1
72 27 1000010010 3

04 40 0000000000 a match 4 5 6 7
15 51 1110000000 3
26 62 0000010000 1
37 73 1001010010 4
